closing.summary: Soybeans has a genuinely strong overall case, especially extreme protein/mineral legume and very low glycemic behaviour. the downsides are there, but anti-nutrients matter and often consumed in processed forms do not outweigh the upside. best when you want fibre, protein, and actual meal utility together.
